task_description: Fix all identified architecture gaps and issues from FULL_ARCHITECTURE_MAP.md section 6, then update the document to reflect resolved items. This includes: fixing duplicate route naming (super-admin vs superadmin), creating missing CRUD APIs (products, segments, price-books, service-categories), adding missing FK constraints in schema files, adding invoice uniqueness validation, and updating the architecture document.

verification.summary: TypeScript compilation (npx tsc --noEmit) passes with zero errors. All new API routes exist and compile correctly. All FK constraints verified via grep. Invoice uniqueness validation confirmed. FULL_ARCHITECTURE_MAP.md has 28 RESOLVED markers. FEAT-004 fixes code review issues: audit-logs param binding, rate limiting, pagination, service-categories [id] route. Tests skipped because vitest requires DB connection not available in sandbox.
